0:
Vuyargur would see the altar polished to a breathless sheen.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level. Furthermore, you may not proceed with a class or job that is different from when you accepted this quest.

24: Speak with the ardent altarkeeper at Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

25: Use the polishing powder at the designated locations.

48: Ever since you helped us to restore the Breathless Altar, we have seen an influx of visitors come to pay their respects.

49: As such, the keeper in charge has grown rather...<Emphasis>impassioned</Emphasis> about its maintenance.

50: For that reason have I acquired this polishing powder from a merchant. Will you go and see it safely delivered into her hands?

51: The altarkeeper has requested more polishing powder for the Breathless Altar. Would you kindly take it to her, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>?

52: And if she asks you to assist in its application...well, you won't mind, I hope.

53: Polishing powder! Oh, thank you for bringing this to me! I was just admiring the crystals.

54: Pretty, aren't they? The hue differs from glowstone, but it is said to signify rich memories of the time when this place slept beneath the sea.

55: And according to Dartorgor's living sepulchre, the snow spirits are drawn to them, too, because they glint like ice in the sunlight! Isn't that something?

57: Sorry, what were we talking about? ...Right! The crystals! Need to polish them!

58: You know, it would mean much to the Breathless Altar if a storied warrior were to do the honors. Take this powder and polish to your heart's content!

59: The crystals would be most grateful if you were to assist me.

60: You may report back to Vuyargur now, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. As altarkeeper, I shall attend to the rest personally.

61: Welcome back, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. I must thank you for not only delivering the polishing agent, but aiding in the maintenance work as well.

62: After lying forgotten for all those years, the Breathless Altar has been raised high by the hands of Yok Huy and many others such as you.

63: Zeal for crystals aside, the keeper's dedication motivates all of us to do our part in looking after the altar.

64: I hope you will help us to preserve its radiance, that we may enjoy the snow spirits' favor for years to come.
